title: AgentJobEnvelope
description: Envelope every SQS message between services in this platform conforms to. The per-agent `payload` object is shape-free at this layer; each consumer validates its own payload shape downstream.

job_id.description: Stable job identifier. Generated by the producer at enqueue time; used as the public.jobs primary key.

tenant_id.description: Tenant UUID the job belongs to. Resolved from the caller's Cognito sub at the ingress, carried through the pipeline, and used by every consumer to scope database access.

agent.description: Logical agent role that owns this job. Consumers assert this matches their own role before processing.

subject_type.description: High-level category of what the job is about (e.g. 'company', 'property', 'person'). Payload shape depends on this.

enqueued_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp at producer enqueue. Used for queue-latency observability.

policy_version.description: Version of the policy rules in effect when the producer enqueued. Propagated through to public.jobs for audit replay.

payload.description: Per-agent payload. Shape varies by agent + subject_type; each consumer validates its own payload downstream.

trace_id.description: Optional W3C traceparent-equivalent. Propagated end-to-end when producers supply it.
